creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
doc 47b7701125a7ef4157cfa9e8318d61b6663175bb (Lorenzo Salvadore, 2023-04-23): 

> fdp-primer/writing-style: Fix section level
> 
> Acronyms are not a subtopic of the one sentence per line technique, so
> it does not make sense to have them in a subsection of the "One sentence
> per line" section.

Before and after the fix (6 then 7 items in the table of contents): 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20230404161928/https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/writing-style/#one-sentence-per-line>

<https://web.archive.org/web/20231223045304/https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/writing-style/#one-sentence-per-line>
